episode.title: MTGFastFinance Ep 446: The WoTC Takeover of EDH
episode.description: James and Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch and then tackle the WOTC takeover of EDH and the results from the new Secret Lair drop.
